items.title: ULA President and CEO Tory Bruno steps down
items.description: United Launch Alliance’s leader for the last 12 years has stepped down. ULA President and CEO Tory Bruno has resigned as of Monday to “pursue another opportunity,” according to a shared statement from the board chairs from Lockheed Martin and Boeing, which share a 50% ownership of the rocket company. “We are grateful for Tory’s service to ULA and the country, and we thank him for his ...

items.title: RKLB, ASTS, TDG: Insiders are Selling These 3 Space Stocks
items.description: Insiders are selling three key space stocks, including two that are up more than 150% in 2025. See which sales create cause for concern.

items.title: Stanley Black & Decker Sells Aerospace Business To Howmet For $1.8 Billion
items.description: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE: HWM) to acquire Consolidated Aerospace Manufacturing from Stanley Black & Decker for $1.8B.

items.title: India Aviation Regulator To Investigate Dec 22 Air India Boeing 777 Incident After Aircraft Returned Due To Low Engine Oil Pressure
